## Artifacts

- [Final press release](documents/press-release-final.md) — final · journalist

## Source Inputs

- Partnership scope, launch date, company boilerplate, and approved spokesperson quote.

## Decisions

- Lead with who, what, when, and why before product details.
- Use one fixed company-description block and a customer-value quote.

## Failed Attempts

- Advertising-heavy wording weakened the news angle.
- A long feature list buried the partnership announcement.

## Reusable Patterns

- Headline: service, target audience, and concrete benefit.
- Lead: company, action, timing, target, and purpose.
- Quote: customer value rather than internal implementation detail.

## Do Not Repeat

- Do not publish internal reporting language as media copy.
- Do not finalize distribution copy while benefit conditions are unclear.

## Playbook Updates


## External Copy

ModuFlow announced a partnership program that helps teams reuse validated production knowledge.

## Internal Reporting Copy

The release positions the partnership as an operational efficiency initiative.
